descriptors.label: bright
descriptors.rationale: High-band energy exceeds low-band energy and the spectral centroid is elevated.

descriptors.label: aggressive
descriptors.rationale: Forward transient bite and elevated upper-band energy support a somewhat aggressive texture label.

descriptors.label: slightly_harsh
descriptors.rationale: Upper-mid buildup is present across the full loop.

summary.plain_text: The loop reads as bright and somewhat aggressive, with mild upper-mid harshness.
caveats: Descriptor confidence may change after source-specific tuning.
